description_long: This armchair features a bold floral upholstery with large white flowers and black centers set against a beige background, creating a striking and playful visual effect. The armrests are elegantly curved and made of dark wood, providing a strong contrast to the soft, patterned fabric. The seat and backrest are generously cushioned, offering comfort and support, while the backrest is slightly reclined for a relaxed seating posture. The legs are slender, slightly tapered, and crafted from dark wood, elevating the chair and adding a touch of sophistication. The overall silhouette is classic yet inviting, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings. The combination of plush upholstery and sturdy wooden elements suggests both comfort and durability.
description: A plush armchair with bold white floral upholstery on a beige background, featuring curved dark wooden armrests and slender wooden legs. The seat and backrest are generously cushioned for comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, cushioned seat, reclined backrest, and prominent curved wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous floral pattern and the backrest's gentle angle, with the wooden legs visible.
description_view_2: Top-rear angled view emphasizing the armchair's depth, the plush seat, and the full coverage of the floral upholstery.
description_view_3: Front angled view displaying both the seat and backrest cushions, as well as the elegant curve of the wooden armrests.
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, slightly reclined, fully upholstered backrest
attribute_upholstery_pattern: large white floral print on beige background
